chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Constitution Petition No. D- 4905 of 2019 __________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge __________________________________________________________ For Orders as to non-prosecution. -------------- 23.10.2024. Mr. Athar Hussain, Advocate for Petitioner. ________ Though the matter is fixed for non-prosecution and Counsel requests for time to make compliance. However, this petition is pending since 2019 and pertains to challenge the Income Support Levy Act, 2013, which has already been decided by the this Court in favour of the taxpayer in the case reported as Yaqoob Ahmed v. Federation of Pakistan & others (2020 PTD 1407) and maintained by the Honourable Supreme Court in the case reported as Commissioner Inland Revenue, Federal Board of Revenue, Karachi v. Muhammad Mustafa Gigi and others (PLD 2022 Supreme Court 420) Accordingly this petition is allowed for the reasons so assigned in the aforesaid judgments. Judge Judge Ayaz P.S.
